name: Pay It Forward (Or Else)
text:
Whenever an opponent who owes you a Favor does another player a favor — gives them a card, a Treasure, a snack, life, or a vote — you collect both ends: sacrifice one of your Favor tokens to make that opponent ALSO give you the same thing. The debt rolls downhill and uphill at once. It's a closed economy. The economy is you.
Whenever this happens, create a Favor token. The chain never ends. The Don designed it that way over a long weekend.
flavorText: Generosity is just debt that hasn't been collected yet. — The Don, embroidered on a pillow
